docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MANCINI,JOHN J. AS TO DEFENDANT SPERLING,SY-SYAM ENTERPRISE,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANCINI,JOHN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPERLING,SY-SYAM ENTERPRISE,INC $1,519.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,534.00, DEFENDANT TO FILE AFFIDAVIT THAT HAIRPIECE DELIVERED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPERLING,SY-SYAM ENTERPRISE,INC
